notes: Initial training on tightly-cropped Olivetti + LFW face images. Model failed on live webcam/Arduino because training data did not match real camera input (train-test domain mismatch).

Retrained on realistic synthetic dataset: 4200 faces composited onto backgrounds at 45-75% frame scale (matching actual ArduCAM captures). 8x augmentation applied (blur, noise, brightness, occlusion, histogram equalization). 52920 training samples total. Early stopping at epoch 49, best weights from epoch 24 (val_accuracy=1.00). INT8 TFLite validation: 100% on 100 samples. Deployed to Arduino Nano 33 BLE Sense Rev2.
